text:
/ci1 1 面倒な船ね……
甲板にある動力源を壊せば
止まってくれるかしら。

/ci1 1 よし！　壊すことなら得意だ！
任せておけ！

/ci1 1 What an annoying ship. Maybe it'll stop
moving if the Power Source on the deck is
destroyed.

/ci1 1 Breaking things is what I do best!
I got this!
